name: accordion
description: A collapsible disclosure group; aria-expanded, aria-controls, arrow-key focus management, single or multiple open mode (WAI-ARIA APG disclosure pattern).
docs:
Register by importing components/ui/accordion.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as an array of { id, label, defaultOpen? } and `type` ('single' | 'multiple'). Project panel content via named slots:
...
. Listen for `lv-change` ({ id, open }) on each toggle.
